models.description: Current DWM-aware last-two-sample predictor with gain 0.75.
Capped ridge residual correction, retrained with stricter correction caps than Phase 4.

runtime_spec_summary.implementation_complexity: moderate: feature normalization and dot products

models.description: Tiny residual correction table keyed by speed, acceleration/turn proxy, and scheduler lead flags.
Piecewise correction table whose cells are enabled only when validation deltas show high-confidence benefit.

runtime_spec_summary.implementation_complexity: low: small keyed table with active-cell guard

models.description: Capped ridge residual correction applied only for high-speed rows whose validation gate passed.

runtime_spec_summary.implementation_complexity: moderate: feature normalization plus simple gate

recommendation.rule: Select a distilled model only if it has zero >5px regressions, preferably zero >3px regressions, p95 delta <= +0.05 px, negative average p99 delta, and no fold with material p99 worsening.
